ab: lawkah su ga,nanu ku banasun su?
en: A: Hello, what are you looking for?

ab: pabaziy kung su utux taku.
en: B: I want to buy a cup.

ab: lawkah su ga,nanu ku banasun su?
en: A: Hello, what are you looking for?

ab: pabaziy kung su utux bubing.
en: B: I want to buy a hat.

ab: pabaziy kung su taku, niya simu matabaziy aw?
ch: A:我要買杯子，你們有賣嗎?
en: A: I want to buy a cup, do you sell them?

ab: kiyan, pisa ku banasun su?
en: B: Yes, how many do you want to buy?

ab: niya simu tabaziy su pinnang aw?
en: A: Do you sell betel nut?

ab: ungat, ini sami tabaziy na pinnang.
en: B: No, we don't sell betel nut.

ab: pabaziy kung su buwax.
en: A: I want to buy rice.

ab: pisa yubing banasun su?
en: B: How many packs do you want to buy?

ab: bi’yi kung su tugan yubing.
en: A: Give me three packs.

ab: pabaziy kung su ngahi’.
en: A: I want to buy sweet potatoes.

ab: wayan su’un tabaziy ku ngahi’ hiya la.
en: B: All the sweet potatoes are sold out.

ab: pabaziy kung su sazing yuyut abura.
en: A: I want to buy two bottles of oil.

ab: utux yuyut balay hara miyan la.
en: B: We only have one bottle left.

ab: ragiy kung musa mabaziy na batu.
en: A: Go buy me eggs.

ab: musa pisa tanatin banasun su?
en: B: How many pounds do you want to buy?

ab: musa pisa tanatin banasun su batu?
en: A: How many pounds of eggs do you want to buy?

ab: pabaziy kung su sazing tanatin.
en: B: I want to buy two catties.

ab: pabaziy kung su sazing baningan na inuw.
en: A: I want to buy two green onions.

ab: tugan baningan hara ku hani, agan kwara la ki!
en: B: There are three left, all for you!

ab: pisa pila utux yubing buwax hani?
en: A: How much is this bag of rice?

ab: utux yubing ga sazing kabahun pila.
en: B: $200 for a pack.

ab: sa’unun kwara’ ga mpusan utux pila, nuway i mapusan pila’ laga asa la.
en: A:The total is $21, just count $20.

ab: mahuway su.
en: B: Thank you.

ab: hani ga ma’isu pagan magan pila.
en: A: Here's $95.

ab: pabaziy kung lawziy tikay, patahaki su utux kabahun pila.
en: B: I'll buy some more, and make up 100 yuan.

ab: yamagan kabahun mapu pila kwara.
en: A:All $510.

ab: hiku su yamagan kabahun pila aw?
en: B: Count me in for $500, okay?

ab: lawkah sa’ayung hani hiya la, musa balayi hawiyun tikay aw?
ch: A:這個太貴了，可以算便宜一點嗎?
en: A: It's too expensive, can you make it cheaper?

ab: ayat ba’un yu, payang mahanuk hani la ki.
ch: B:不行，這個已經很便宜了。
en: B: No, this is already very cheap.

ab: galun mu utux yubing pinkan hani.
en: A: I want this packet of cookies.

ab: pinkan hani ga mtayun pila, pa’agan su yuwaw binah na aw?
ch: B:這餅乾30元，還需要別的東西嗎?
en: B: $30 for the cookies, anything else you need?
